---
pagetitle: "Muller Chen Blog"
page-layout: article
toc: false
listing:
  - id: home-stream
    contents:
      - posts/**/*.qmd
    exclude:
      filename: ["index.qmd", "*-en.qmd"]
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description, categories]
    date-format: "YYYY.MM.DD"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    page-size: 20
---

::: {.masthead}
# Muller Chen
在因果推論與機器學習的交界處做筆記，偶爾寫點隨筆。
:::

::: {#home-stream}
:::
